name: Eggless Mock Mayonnaise
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl or blender, combine the evaporated milk, salt, paprika, prepared mustard, and white pepper.
2. Gradually beat in the vegetable oil until well combined.
3. Thin the mixture with 3-4 teaspoons of lemon juice.
4. Cover and refrigerate.
Makes about 3/4 cup. Good with coleslaw, egg salad sandwich, potato salad.
